scripts.server:install: python3 -m venv apps/server/.venv && apps/server/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r apps/server/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:server: sh -c 'if [ -f apps/server/.env ]; then set -a; . apps/server/.env; set +a; fi; PORT=${PORT:-}; if [ -z "$PORT" ]; then PORT=$(apps/server/.venv/bin/python -c "import socket;s=socket.socket();s.bind((\"127.0.0.1\",0));print(s.getsockname()[1]);s.close()" ); fi; echo "Django running on port $PORT"; apps/server/.venv/bin/python apps/server/manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:$PORT'
